scripts.dev: concurrently -n fe,be -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint:py && npm run lint:ts
scripts.test: npm run test:py && npm run test:ts
scripts.clean: rm -rf frontend/dist exports/**/*.csv exports/**/*.json exports/**/*.parquet exports/**/*.xlsx temp screenshots
scripts.setup: python -m venv venv && .\venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt && cd frontend && npm install
